nodes.title: List Vouchers
nodes.description: GET /api/businesses/:bizId/vouchers with Authorization header. Supports query params: type (receipt|payment|transfer), dateFrom, dateTo, page, limit. Returns paginated array of vouchers with {id, voucherNumber, type, date, amount, description, lines[], status}.

nodes.title: Validate Voucher Data
nodes.description: Validates voucher payload before creation. Checks: operationTypeId is required (returns 400 'operationTypeId: Required'), type must be receipt|payment|transfer, amount > 0, fromAccountId and toAccountId must exist and belong to business. For transfer type: rejects if both accounts are 'safe' type (returns 400 'لا يمكن التحويل بين خزينتين').

nodes.title: Create Voucher
nodes.description: POST /api/businesses/:bizId/vouchers with {type, date, amount, description, fromAccountId, toAccountId, currencyId, operationTypeId, lines[]}. Generates sequential voucher number, creates voucher record, updates account and fund balances. Returns created voucher with generated number.

nodes.title: Update Voucher
nodes.description: PUT /api/businesses/:bizId/vouchers/:id with {date?, amount?, description?, lines?[]}. Updates voucher fields. Returns updated voucher object.

nodes.title: Delete Voucher
nodes.description: DELETE /api/businesses/:bizId/vouchers/:id. Reverses all balance changes (account balances and fund balances), deletes voucher lines, then deletes voucher. Returns 200 with {message: 'تم الحذف'}.

nodes.title: Reverse Voucher
nodes.description: POST /api/businesses/:bizId/vouchers/:id/reverse with Authorization header. Creates a new reversal voucher that negates the original voucher's balance effects. Marks original voucher as reversed. Returns new reversal voucher object.

nodes.title: Create Draft Voucher
nodes.description: POST /api/businesses/:bizId/vouchers-draft with {type, date, amount, description, fromAccountId, toAccountId, currencyId, operationTypeId}. Creates voucher in draft status without affecting balances. Returns draft voucher object with status='draft'.
